mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ai_career_plan.goal WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_primary = true LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM ai_career_plan.goal WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_primary = false ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM ai_career_plan.goal WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE ai_career_plan.goal SET title = #{title}, goal_desc = #{goalDesc}, status = #{status}, progress = #{progress}, eta = #{eta}, is_primary = #{isPrimary}, success_salary = #{successSalary}, success_companies = #{successCompanies}::jsonb, success_cities = #{successCities}::jsonb, long_term_aspirations = #{longTermAspirations}::jsonb, ai_advice = #{aiAdvice}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM ai_career_plan.goal WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
